descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Vibration] Count
At 6+ [Vibration] Count, Coin Power +1

coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 9+ [Vibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 8+ [Vibration], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Vibration] Count
At 6+ [Vibration] Count, Coin Power +1
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 7+ [Vibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Vibration], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Vibration] Count
At 5+ [Vibration] Count, Coin Power +1
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 6+ [Vibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Vibration], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Consume 10 [Vibration] Count on self to gain Coin Power +2
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If this Skill consumed [Vibration] Count on use, trigger [FusionVibration] into [VibrationEcho]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1
- If this unit did not consume [Vibration] Count with Skill use, activate the above effect, then trigger [VibrationExplosion] on self

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 6 [Vibration] on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] At  less than 15 [Vibration] Count on self, consume 10 [Vibration] Count to gain Coin Power +2
[WhenUse] Consume 15 [Vibration] Count on self to gain Coin Power +3
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If this Skill consumed [Vibration] Count on use, trigger [FusionVibration] into [VibrationEcho]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1
[OnSucceedAttack] If this Skill consumed 10+ [Vibration] Count on Skill Use, trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

[OnSucceedAttack] If this Skill consumed 10+ [Vibration] Count on Skill Use, trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1
- If this unit consumed less than 15 [Vibration] Count, trigger [VibrationExplosion] on self after activating the above effect

descs.desc: [WhenUse] Gain 2 x ([Vibration] Count on target) as Shield HP (max 7)
[WhenUse] Gain 2 x ([Vibration] Count on target) as Shield HP (max 13)

1060901.name: Vibroweld Morph-combat Cane (Unauthorized Invention)
1060901.desc: Turn End: gain [AttackDmgUp] next turn equal to the number of times this unit triggered [VibrationExplosion] this turn (max 3)

1060921.name: In the Culprit's Shoes
1060921.desc: When #1 Deployed Identity triggers [VibrationExplosion] with Skill or Coin effects, 25% chance to trigger an additional [VibrationExplosion] (once per turn)
